nameMeanings.name: Margarita~
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Spanish: from the female personal name Margarita, from Greek margaritēs ‘pearl’.

variants.name: Margaritis
meanings: Greek: from the personal name Margaritis, male form of Margarita , or a shortened form of any of various derivatives of this name, e.g. the patronymics Margaritakis and Margaritopoulos.

variants.name: Margarito
meanings: Spanish: altered form of Margarita , with the male suffix -o for matching with the sex of the bearer of the surname.

en.lifeSummary: Margarita~ was born in 1273. She married Thomas de Multon in 1290, in South Molton, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter.
